data.title: Haoma Organic Vegan Skincare - No Preservatives, Emulsifiers - 10% OFF
data.metaDescription: Different Approach to Skincare. Haoma is a Certified Organic and Vegan, Pure Plant, Plastic Free Cosmetics Brand. We do not use processed or plant-derived synthetics. No preservatives. No Emulsifiers. Handmade in Small Batches in England

issues.impact: Google will cut off your title in search results. You're losing valuable click-through real estate.
issues.fix: Trim to under 60 characters. Front-load your most important keywords.

issues.impact: Google truncates long descriptions. Your call-to-action is probably getting cut off.
issues.fix: Trim to 150-160 characters. Put the most important info first.

issues.impact: Search engines use H1s to understand what your page is about. You're invisible.
issues.fix: Add exactly one H1 per page that clearly describes the page content

issues.impact: Missing out on rich snippets (star ratings, prices, availability) in search results.
issues.fix: Add schema.org JSON-LD markup for products, reviews, FAQs, or local business

summary: We analyzed haoma.co.uk and found 4 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
